name: Hinode
description: A calm, beautiful new tab with sunrise-inspired design.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:7000; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.unsplash.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self'; object-src 'self';
